description.value:
Elementalist monks bond their minds and bodies with &reference[elemental] forces. The elements permeate all things, and elementalists learn to infuse their bodies with one of four &reference[elemental] attunements, switching attunements to use different powers. They are always walking in a world of extremes, and have the ability to unleash these extreme forces upon their enemies.

The Elementalist

Level

Features

3

@UUID[Compendium.elkan5e.elkan5e-class-features.Item.mlT1aoGbTuxlSFn5]{&reference[elemental] Attunement}, @UUID[Compendium.elkan5e.elkan5e-class-features.Item.RFs2JK8U1HWwRtRy]{&reference[elemental] Thrust}

6

&reference[elemental] Control Spells

Greater &reference[elemental] Control Spells

advancement.title: Elementalist Spells
advancement.hint:
Depending on which elemental attunement you have active, you can draw on ki to cast certain spells. These spells will now appear when you activate an elemental attunement.

You cast these spells at 1st level, 2nd level, or 3rd level. They cost a number of ki points equal to the level at which you cast the spell (ex. 2 ki points to cast Burning Hands at 2nd level).​

The casting time for these spells is a bonus action regardless of their usual casting time.



You can cast these spells when you have the corresponding attunement active:
    Air: Thunderwave
    Earth: False Life
    Fire: Burning Hands
    Water: Gentle Current

advancement.title: Elementalist Spells
advancement.hint:
You learn new spells, which will now appear when you activate an elemental attunement.
  
  Air: Fly
  
  Earth: Rock Blast
  
  Fire: Fireball
  
  Water: Sleet Storm
